body.title: Rename IGOR_HOME_DB_URL → UU_HOME_DB_URL across codebase
body.result: 470 refs renamed to UU_HOME_DB_URL; backward-compat shim in db_proxy.py, paths.py, and unseen_university/__init__.py reads IGOR_HOME_DB_URL as fallback
body.intention: I intend that the DB connection env var uses the UnseenUniversity namespace so it is meaningful without Igor present.
body.description:
IGOR_HOME_DB_URL is the wrong namespace — the database belongs to UnseenUniversity, not Igor. Rename to UU_HOME_DB_URL everywhere. 436 references across .py files.

**Affected files:** grep -rn IGOR_HOME_DB_URL — ~436 references, primarily devices/, unseen_university/, lab/claudecode/, migrations
**Design rules:** No SQLite. Portability — UU must run without Igor.
**Scope boundary:** IN: rename env var string, update all references, update .env.example / docs. OUT: actual DB schema changes, changing what the var points to.
**Completion criteria:** `grep -rn IGOR_HOME_DB_URL` returns 0 results outside .git; `grep -rn UU_HOME_DB_URL` returns same count; system boots and tests pass with new var name. Backward-compat shim: read IGOR_HOME_DB_URL as fallback for one cycle.
